tests.name: R1_material_policy_drywall
tests.reply_excerpt:
Thanks for asking! For drywall repair, we provide labor only — you’ll purchase the drywall, joint compound, tape, and any other materials needed.

Our labor pricing for drywall patching starts at:
• Small patch (up to 6"): from $120
• Medium patch (6"–12"): from $180
• Large patch (12"+): from $250
tests.notes: OK — no "materials included" present | policy=banned_material_phrase: provide materials
